/usr/bin/cc  -O3 -Wall -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/home/hyx/mpich-install/lib -Wl,--enable-new-dtags CMakeFiles/pca_svd_ser.dir/src/benchmark/svd_ser.c.o CMakeFiles/pca_svd_ser.dir/src/core/matrix.c.o CMakeFiles/pca_svd_ser.dir/src/core/jacobi_ser.c.o CMakeFiles/pca_svd_ser.dir/src/core/jacobi_par.c.o CMakeFiles/pca_svd_ser.dir/src/core/pca.c.o CMakeFiles/pca_svd_ser.dir/src/core/utils.c.o -o ../bin/pca_svd_ser  -Wl,-rpath,/home/hyx/mpich-install/lib /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liblapacke.so -lm /home/hyx/mpich-install/lib/libmpi.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopenblas.so -lm -ldl
